title: Doubtnut Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Doubtnut Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Doubtnut Advisory Limited family as a Subject Matter Expert in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Doubtnut Advisory Limited:
Doubtnut Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut Advisory Limited!
